name: signingCreateKey
title: Create Signing Key
description: Creates a new Ed25519 key pair in the peer's signing service. The private key is encrypted and stored server-side, associated with the authenticated identity and passphrase. Requires authentication via bearer token.

passphrase.description: Passphrase to encrypt the private key. Required for future operations with this key.

publicKey.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 public key of the created key pair
